</traits>

**Source** [Rage of Elements](/Sources.aspx?ID=205) pg. 41

_[**PFS Note**](/pathfinder-society) For Pathfinder Society play, any druid with an animal companion may take a metal elemental as their companion_

Your companion is a metal elemental, such as a mercurial. Metal elementals don't have any special access because druids don't have an order dedicated to the elemental magic of metal.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
spike,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +1

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12)

**Speed** 25 feet

 

**Support Benefit** Your metal elemental pierces an enemy with metal spikes that cause it to bleed. Until the start of your next turn, your Strikes that damage a creature in your metal elemental's reach also deal 1d6 [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29). If your metal elemental is nimble or savage, the persistent bleed damage increases to 2d6.

**Advanced Maneuver** Spiked Bunker

<traits>

<trait label="Wood" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=508" />
</traits>

**Source** [Rage of Elements](/Sources.aspx?ID=205) pg. 41

_[**PFS Note**](/pathfinder-society) Druids of the specifically listed orders may also take the other elementals (e.g. a wave order druid may take a water elemental companion)._

Your companion is a wood elemental, such as a [moss sloth](/Monsters.aspx?ID=2671).

<column gap="tiny">

**Access** You are a member of the [leaf order](/DruidicOrders.aspx?ID=2).

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
branch,
**Damage** 1d8 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +1

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12)

**Speed** 25 feet, climb 25 feet

 

**Support Benefit** Your wood elemental entangles your foes with detachable branches and roots. Until the start of your next turn, if you hit with a Strike that deals damage to a creature in your wood elemental's reach, the creature takes a –5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (–10 on a critical success). The creature, or a creature adjacent to it, can use an Interact action to unravel the branches and roots and remove the penalty.

**Speed** 25 feet, burrow 10 feet, climb 10 feet

 

**Support Benefit** Your badger digs around your foe's position, interfering with its footing. Until the start of your next turn, if you hit and deal damage to a creature your badger threatens, the target can't use a Step action (unless it can Step through difficult terrain) until it moves from its current position.

**Advanced Maneuver** Badger Rage

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 1" pfs="Standard">[Crocodile](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=74)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 208

Your companion is a crocodile or a similar crocodilian reptile, such as an alligator or caiman.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
tail ([Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179)),
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 6

**Skill** [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15)

**Senses** [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=23)

**Speed** 20 feet, swim 25 feet

**Special** The crocodile can hold its breath for about 2 hours.

**Support Benefit** Your crocodile clamps its jaws on your foe, refusing to let go. Until the start of your next turn, if your Strike damages a creature in your crocodile's reach, your crocodile can latch onto the creature. While thus attached, the crocodile can move along with the target whenever the target moves until the end of your next turn. Your crocodile can latch onto only one creature in this way, and it must release the creature to make a jaws Strike. If the target is smaller than the crocodile, it takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds and can't [Fly](/Actions.aspx?ID=94) while the crocodile is latched on.

**Advanced Maneuver** Death Roll

</column>

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 1" pfs="Standard">[Riding Drake](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=77)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Uncommon" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=159" />
<trait label="Dragon" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=50" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 209

Your companion is a swift, flightless drake with limited intelligence, less vicious than most drakes but fiercely loyal to you. A riding drake has the [dragon](/Traits.aspx?ID=50) trait instead of the [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=9) trait, but it otherwise functions normally as an animal companion.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
tail,
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +1

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +2
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12)

**Speed** 45 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** Your drake snorts fire in your foes' faces. Until the start of your next turn, each time you Strike while riding the drake and hit a creature in the drake's reach, the creature takes 1d4 fire damage from the drake. If your drake is nimble or savage, the fire damage increases to 2d4.

**Advanced Maneuver** Fire Breath

</column>

<document level="2" id="action-2282" />

Your companion is one of the various species of giant scorpion.

stinger,

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 91

Your companion is a giraffe.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
hoof ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)),
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
neck ([nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684) 10 feet),
**Damage** 1d4 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40)

**Senses** [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=69), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407)) 30 feet

**Speed** 35 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** Your giraffe pushes against opponents with its long neck. While riding on your giraffe this turn, you do not need a hand free to [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380) and any foe you successfully Shove moves 10 feet (15 feet on a critical success).

**Advanced Maneuver** Long Stomp

</column>

<document level="2" id="action-2783" />

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 91

Your companion is a kangaroo or wallaby.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
foot ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)),
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 6

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=69)

**Speed** 30 feet

**Special** When the kangaroo [Leaps](/Actions.aspx?ID=2298) horizontally, it travels up to 25 feet.

**Support Benefit** Your kangaroo bounces and shifts back and forth. Until the start of your next turn, it counts as being in its space or an empty space of your choice within 5 feet when determining whether you and your companion are [flanking](/Rules.aspx?ID=2375); you can choose a different space for each of your attacks.

**Advanced Maneuver** Spring Kick

</column>

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 1" pfs="Standard">[Mole](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=89)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 91

Your companion is a giant mole, gopher, or prairie dog.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
claw ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)),
**Damage** 1d6 slashing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48)

**Senses** [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=69), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407)) 30 feet

**Speed** 25 feet, burrow 20 feet

 

**Support Benefit** Your mole leaps into the ground and burrows beneath your foes, disturbing their footing. Until the end of your next turn, if you hit and damage a creature adjacent to your mole, that creature is [clumsy](/Conditions.aspx?ID=61) 1 until it moves from its current position.

**Advanced Maneuver** Burrowing Ambush

</column>

<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad](/Sources.aspx?ID=14) pg. 80

Your companion is a camel or llama

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Medium or Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d6 piercing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16)

**Senses** [low-light vision](/Rules.aspx?ID=416), [scent](/Rules.aspx?ID=417) (imprecise, 30 feet)

**Speed** 35 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=150); your camel ignores the harmful effects of [mild, severe, and extreme cold or heat](/Rules.aspx?ID=642), selected when you gain the companion

**Advanced Maneuver** Sand Stride

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 92

Your companion is a salamander, newt, axolotl, or similar amphibian.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Small

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
tail,
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d4 piercing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +1
</row>

**Hit Points** 6

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59)

**Speed** 20 feet, swim 10 feet

 

**Support Benefit** Your salamander secretes a poisonous, viscous fluid from its skin. Until the start of your next turn, if you or your salamander are hit by a creature adjacent to the salamander, that creature takes 1d6 poison damage. **Advanced Maneuver** Poisonous Sweep

</column>

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 1" pfs="Standard">[Shotalashu](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=92)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Uncommon" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=721" />
<trait label="Beast" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=547" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 92

Your companion is a [shotalashu](/Monsters.aspx?ID=3309), a telepathic creature originally from the planet of Castrovel but now introduced in small numbers to Golarion. Acquiring a shotalashu typically requires that the prospective rider bond with it first by spending a week of time with it and succeeding on a DC 21 [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44) check to establish a telepathic link. A rider who fails the check can attempt it again after another week with the shotalashu for each attempt. Any creature with telepathic capabilities, such as telepathy, touch telepathy, empathic sense, or the ability to cast spells such as [_telepathy_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1719), gains a +4 circumstance bonus to this check. The GM is the final arbiter of whether a given ability counts as telepathy for the purposes of forming a link. This link remains, and neither can form a new link until one member dies. The shock of a bonded partner dying leaves the survivor [stupefied](/Conditions.aspx?ID=94) 2 for 24 hours and prevents them from forming a new link for at least a month.

A shotalashu has the [beast](/Traits.aspx?ID=547) trait instead of the [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=531) trait but otherwise functions normally as an animal companion.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Medium or Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
claw ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)),
**Damage** 1d6 slashing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +3

**Con** +2

**Int** -3

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +2
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59)

**Speed** 40 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** The shotalashu telepathically assails your enemies when you create an opening. Until the start of your next turn, each time you hit a creature in the shotalashu's reach with a Strike, the creature takes 1d6 mental damage from the shotalashu. If your shotalashu is [nimble](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=7) or [savage](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=8), the mental damage increases to 2d6.

**Advanced Maneuver** Telepathic Pounce

</column>

<document level="2" id="action-2788" />
name: Shotalashu

Until the start of your next turn, whenever you successfully Strike a creature your giant frog threatens, that creature can’t use reactions triggered by your actions unless its level is higher than yours. Advanced Maneuver Tongue Grab

<traits>
<trait label="Uncommon" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=721" />
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 93

Your companion is a large wasp, hornet, or other stinging hymenopteran.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
stinger ([finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602)),
**Damage** 1d6 piercing plus poison

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +3

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 4

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59)

**Speed** 20 feet, fly 40 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** Your wasp drones its wings, unnerving your enemies. Until the start of your next turn, if you hit and deal damage to a creature in your giant wasp’s reach, the creature becomes [frightened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=76) 1.

**Advanced Maneuver** Darting Stab

</column>

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 93

Your companion is a majestic beast combining the features of a raptor and a lion.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
beak,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
talon ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)),
**Damage** 1d6 slashing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +2

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407)) 30 feet

**Speed** 25 feet, fly 60 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** Your griffon adopts a noble pose, inspiring you to defy the horrors before you. Until the start of your next turn, you and your griffon gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590) effects.

**Advanced Maneuver** Flying Strafe

</column>

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 4" pfs="Standard">[Hippocampus](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=97)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Aquatic" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=533" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 94

Your companion is a strange beast combining aspects of a horse and a fish.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
tail,
**Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +1

**Con** +3

**Int** -4

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 6

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=2407)) 30 feet

**Speed** 5 feet, swim 40 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417)

**Support Benefit** Until the start of your next turn, if you’re mounted on your hippocampus and moved 10 feet or more on the action before a melee Strike, add a circumstance bonus to damage for that Strike equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice. If your weapon already has the [jousting](/Traits.aspx?ID=638) weapon trait, increase the trait’s damage bonus by 2 per die instead.

**Advanced Maneuver** Sudden Retreat

</column>

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion 6" pfs="Standard">[Orca](/AnimalCompanions.aspx?ID=99)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Animal" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=531" />
<trait label="Minion" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=653" />
</traits>

**Source** [Howl of the Wild](/Sources.aspx?ID=226) pg. 94

Your companion is a killer whale.

<column gap="tiny">

 

**Size** Large

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
jaws,
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +2

**Con** +3

**Int** -4

**Wis** +0

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hit Points** 8

**Skill** [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49)

**Senses** echolocation 30 feet (the orca can use hearing as a [precise sense](/Rules.aspx?ID=2406) within this range while underwater)

**Speed** 5 feet, swim 40 feet

**Special** [mount](/Rules.aspx?ID=3417); the orca can hold its breath for 20 minutes.

**Support Benefit** Your orca attempts to drag down unwary swimmers. Until the start of your next turn, each time you hit a swimming creature in the orca’s reach, the target is pulled 5 feet down into the water. This is [forced movement](/Rules.aspx?ID=2364).

**Advanced Maneuver** Breach

</column>
